rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0001
rows.name: The Central Life is here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0002
rows.name:
The coordinates point to the ocean
west of the Black Steel Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0003
rows.name:
It looks like it's sunk beneath the sea.
No wonder we couldn't find it until now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0004
rows.name: It's at the bottom of the sea, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0005
rows.name:
Even if it's on the ocean
floor, we still have to go.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0005_02
rows.name: Right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0006
rows.name:
The survival of humanity
depends on your work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0007
rows.name: Elma, please save us. I beg you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0008
rows.name: Don't be so formal, Nagi.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0009
rows.name:
I boarded your ship for that very
purpose, and now I am here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0010
rows.name:
My determination hasn't changed
a bit since back then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0011
rows.name: I'm sorry. We always end up relying on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0012
rows.name:
In exchange, once everything is
resolved, give me a long vacation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0013
rows.name:
This planet never stops fascinating me. There are
so many places I want to see, mission or not.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0014
rows.name: In that case, Tatsu will guide you, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0015
rows.name:
Ah, of course, no payment needed,
mo. Free of charge is fine, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0016
rows.name:
Honestly Tatsu, where did
you learn a word like that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0017
rows.name:
We've already transmitted the Central
Life's coordinates to each team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0018
rows.name:
Elma, I want you to take
frontline command of all teams.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0019
rows.name: I humbly accept, Chief Engineer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0020
rows.name: I knew it. That title feels much better![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0021
rows.name:
"Commander" and all that is
too stiff and stuffy for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0022
rows.name: I figured as much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0022_2
rows.name: Well then, everyone, let's go![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0023
rows.name: Yes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12030100_MSG0024
rows.name: I brought the bento too, mo![ST:wait ]
